sections.paragraph:
Original: נבחז

Transliteration: nibchaz

Phonetic: nib-khaz'

BDB Definition:

Nibhaz = "the barker"
  1. a deity of the Avites introduced by them into Samaria in the time of Shalmaneser; idol had the figure of a dog

Origin: of foreign origin

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
